title: rubus × tramitum
intro: Rubus × tramitum, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Rubus genus. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × tramitum include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
